title: Attributes
instruction_1: In this section you can manage the attributes of the categories
instruction_2: Attributes are characteristics that the published items/products possess, for example, size, color, weight, etc.
instruction_3: Each category has its own characteristics, and all subcategories within a category will share those characteristics.
editor_cancel_title: Do you want to cancel the edition?
editor_save_title: Do you want to save this attribute?
editor_save_message: Make sure all the information is correct before continuing
editor_recove_title: Do you want to recover this attribute?
editor_remove_title: Do you want to delete this attribute?
editor_remove_image: Do you want to delete this image?
editor_recove_image: Do you want to recover this image?
editor_remove_category: Do you want to delete this category?
can_restore_later: You can get it back later
editor_disable_message: This will disable the attribute and it will not be visible to the public, but it will be saved in the database.
editor_delete_message: Once deleted, it cannot be recovered and any records related to this product will be lost.
editor_invalid_price: The attribute must have a price greater than 0
editor_invalid_name: The attribute must have a name
no_products_in_category: There are no attributes in this category yet.
attribute_value_no_repeated: That name already exists for a value in that attribute.
attribute_remove_title: Do you want to delete that attribute?
attribute_remove_message: Once deleted, it cannot be recovered and any records related to this product will be lost.
attribute_disable_message: This will disable the attribute and it will not be visible to the public, but it will be saved in the database.
attribute_enable_message: Users will be able to view it again
attribute_enable_title: Do you want to restore that attribute?
attribute_value_enable_title: Do you want to restore that attribute value?
attribute_value_remove_title: Do you want to delete that attribute value?
attribute_no_repeated: That name already exists for a value in that attribute.
cancel_edition_message: The changes made will not be saved
save_edition_message: All changes made will be applied. If you removed any attributes (or one of their values), this will apply to all your existing products. This is irreversible, so proceed with caution.
